slots.label: Rubber insert durability failure
slots.summary: One user reports that the rubber insert near the ear deteriorated and fell apart in less than two years.

slots.label: Potential optical magnification affecting depth perception
slots.summary: One user reports that the lenses slightly magnify vision, making the ground appear closer during walking or outdoor navigation.

slots.label: Add durability-validation notes and warranty scope for the rubber ear insert, and describe the actual material and test scope without claiming unsupported lifetime thresholds.
slots.summary: The rubber insert near the ear is cited as failing within two years, yet no warranty, material specification, or durability claim appears anywhere in text or image content — creating unmanaged customer expectations.; Retrievals confirm zero mention of rubber composition, reinforcement, or warranty in all examined text blocks and image regions.

slots.label: Add product-page optical verification notes and publish the measured distortion or prism-control results before making strong visual-performance claims.
slots.summary: No product-page claims or test data about optical clarity, distortion control, non-prescription status, or measured visual performance were retrieved.; No retrieved text or image content references optical clarity, edge distortion, or real-world visual use cases.

slots.label: State the current selling price and any active discount or list-price reference directly in the primary product metadata so the value claim can be checked quickly.
slots.summary: Price is praised as 'excellent' but no numeric price or comparative context (e.g., original vs. current, % off) appears in any retrieved text block — undermining credibility of the value claim.; All retrievals for price-related queries returned only category breadcrumbs or product name, with no pricing data found.

slots.label: State the exact lens tint in the primary product copy and include a color-accurate front-facing lens image so the tint claim can be checked visually.
slots.summary: Product images visually show tinted lenses, but the product text does not explicitly name the tint color or hue.

slots.label: Clarify the fit and comfort-related design cues on the product page, and add close-up visuals of the features that help users judge wear comfort.
slots.summary: Comfort is positively mentioned by a user review, but no product-page text or reliable image evidence was retrieved to substantiate the claim.
